project_name: KiCad PCB Board Schema and Design
job_title: KiCad PCB Board Schema and Design
project_domain: KiCad PCB layout, routing, and manufacturing package delivery for Raspberry Pi 4 carrier board
key_features: Complete mostly-finished schematic into layout-ready design, 100x80 mm 2/4-layer board planning, Raspberry Pi 4 carrier integration, Southco R4-EM rotary latch drive path, PN532 UART NFC connectivity, DFM-focused routing, manufacturing-ready output package
milestone_1_desc: Schematic completion audit and layout constraint definition
milestone_2_desc: Component placement and stack-up strategy for 100x80 mm board
milestone_3_desc: Routing, power integrity checks, and interface validation
milestone_4_desc: Manufacturing package generation and release handoff
